title: Chapter 1 Quiz
sub: Questions on Mr. Bepo's breakdown and Stardom Schools

questions.q: Why was Mr. Bepo called 'The Lekki Headmaster'?
opts: He was the oldest teacher in Lekki
Because of his humorous imitation of Village Headmaster characters
He once appeared on Village Headmaster TV show
He was a headmaster in a Lekki primary school

questions.q: Who ended the assembly after Mr. Bepo broke down?
Who was the Vice Principal of Stardom Schools?
What percentage success rate did the school record in WASSCE?
Which student delivered a speech about the excursion to Jos?

Who attempted to counsel Mr. Bepo after his breakdown?
What does the title 'The Lekki Headmaster' refer to?
opts: A nickname from Mr. Bepo's acting style
A character in a Nollywood film

questions.q: What is the name of the school where Mr. Bepo works?
Who is the Managing Director of Stardom Schools?
What did Mr. Bepo's breakdown at assembly reveal?
opts: He was resigning and relocating abroad
He was retiring due to old age

questions.q: What is the full name of the school Mr. Bepo works at?
Which Nigerian TV show is referenced in Mr. Bepo's nickname?

opts: He was saying farewell during assembly

questions.q: What role did Mrs. Grace Apeh play at Stardom Schools?
What did Ikenna Egbu's speech at assembly focus on?
What did Mr. Bepo's colleagues think of his announcement?
What subject did Mr. Bepo teach at Stardom Schools?
What does Mr. Bepo's character represent in the novel?
opts: A dedicated Nigerian educator facing migration pressures

questions.q: Which country was Mr. Bepo relocating to?
Who first called Mr. Bepo 'The Lekki Headmaster'?
What was the name of the school Mr. Bepo once established with a friend?
What was Mr. Bepo's monthly salary in Nigeria?

opts: Wealthy families moved away due to poor road conditions

questions.q: What major benefit did Nike and Kike enjoy in the UK?
Who are Nike and Kike in relation to Mr. Bepo?
What is 'Japa' as used in the novel?
opts: Slang for migrating abroad for better opportunities

questions.q: What major attractions drew Nigerians to relocate abroad according to Chapter 3?
What was Jare's profession before relocating abroad?
Why did Jare become distressed after relocating?
opts: He could not find a job
His job involved caring for elderly people
His family refused to join him

questions.q: What was Hope studying for when his wife stopped funding him?
What Idoma proverb is mentioned in Chapter 3?
opts: The early bird catches the worm
The same rain nourishes sugarcane and bitter leaf differently
A child who knows his father's path will walk it
A tree does not make a forest

questions.q: What did Riike do to assist relatives in migrating?
opts: Sponsored two sisters to the US

questions.q: What school did Mr. Bepo work at before Fruitful Future School?
Which of the following best describes Mr. Nku's action before relocating?
opts: He took a ₦2m loan and left without repaying it
He donated his savings to the school

questions.q: What shocking discovery was made during the Ignatius visa process?
opts: Mrs. Ignatius had a criminal record
A DNA test revealed Favour was not Mr. Ignatius's biological child
Their visa was rejected on security grounds

questions.q: Who was Favour Ignatius?
opts: An SSS2 student at Stardom Schools

questions.q: What was Mr. Ayesoro's nickname among students?
How much was in the Stardom Cooperative Society account?
What does 'Snake in the Roof' symbolize in the novel?
opts: A real snake problem in the school
A hidden danger that may cause future problems
An illegal activity on school premises

questions.q: What loan limit was introduced after the MD's discovery?
Which sentence was at the center of Mr. Farore's dismissal?
opts: Ade as well as Jide come early
Ade as well as Jide comes early
Ade together with Jide come early

questions.q: Who defended Mr. Farore's grammar?
What happened to Mr. Farore after verification?
Who must approve future cooperative loan requests?
Why was Mr. Ayesoro transferred to Stardom Hub?
opts: A parent complained her child had frightening dreams about him

questions.q: Who was Bibi's mother?
Why did Mrs. Ignatius contact Mr. Bepo?
opts: To seek guidance after her husband threw her out

questions.q: What profession did Mrs. Ignatius learn before the family planned to relocate?
What did the MD fear after seeing the ₦95 million cooperative?
How much of the cooperative funds had already been loaned out?
Who was Mr. Farore?
opts: An English teacher at Stardom Schools

questions.q: Who was Mr. Guta?
opts: A parent who caused Mr. Farore's dismissal

questions.q: Why was the correct verb in 'Ade as well as Jide ___ early' the word 'comes'?
opts: Because the verb agrees with the first subject when 'as well as' is used

questions.q: What did Mr. Audu do after the grammar crisis was resolved?
opts: He reported the incident to the Board
He apologized on behalf of Mr. Guta
He eased tension with a joke
He asked Mr. Farore to resign voluntarily

questions.q: What was the name of the school Mr. Bepo worked at before Stardom?
What was wrong with the name 'Beesway Group of School'?
What did Mr. Bepo observe the five men doing at night?
opts: Apparently burying a cow in a pit

questions.q: What did Mr. Egi Meko claim the night ritual was?
opts: A prayer ceremony for his late father

questions.q: What did parent Mr. Ogo suggest to attract more pupils to Fruitful Future School?
What did Mr. Bepo do when Mr. Ogo suggested rituals?
opts: He reported Mr. Ogo to the government
He asked for time to think

questions.q: What crime did Mr. Ogo commit later in life?
opts: He murdered a woman who demanded a refund for spiritual services

questions.q: How much had the woman paid Mr. Ogo for spiritual services?
What was the Breath Project?
opts: Students developing mobile phones from recycled panels

questions.q: Who were Banky and Tosh?
opts: Students who competed for Social Prefect
Two parents in a legal battle

questions.q: What did Banky say about Tosh during Speech Day?
opts: He said Tosh copied his work
He called him 'the son of an ex-convict'
He accused him of cheating in exams

questions.q: Why was Chief Ogba technically NOT an ex-convict?
opts: He was acquitted by the court
He was detained but never convicted — he was released and ordered to refund the money

questions.q: How much was Chief Ogba alleged to have misappropriated?
How long was Chief Ogba detained?
What did Chief Ogba demand from Banky's family?
opts: Written apologies and publication in the school magazine

questions.q: Which waterfall is described as one of the highest in West Africa?

opts: He compared it to a new form of slavery
He called it a government failure

questions.q: What did Mr. Bepo teach students when they looked down on communities like Mushin?
opts: That poor communities should be avoided
That success depends on determination and education, not birthplace
That the government should relocate those communities

questions.q: What did the Akran of Badagry tell the students?
opts: How Badagry became the capital of Lagos
The history of Badagry and that its name originated from 'Agbadarigi'
That the slave trade never happened in Badagry

opts: A business center operator in Ibadan who helped with passport processing

questions.q: Which poem did Ibadan remind Mr. Bepo of?

opts: The failure of Nigerian citizens abroad

opts: It was cancelled due to rain

He was given a warning letter

Relief that school was behind him

The Japa phenomenon — the struggle of skilled Nigerians choosing to leave
